prompt: Create a highly detailed photorealistic fashion portrait of a young woman in full gothic lolita style, seated on a pale stone-tiled terrace under dappled sunlight and soft shadows. The camera looks down from a high three-quarter angle, close enough to show her face, clothing textures, hands, legs, boots, and the parasol. She has long dark brown wavy hair with straight bangs, pale porcelain skin, large light gray-blue eyes, delicate doll-like makeup, glossy red lips, and a calm slightly melancholic expression while looking up toward the viewer. Her outfit is black and white gothic lolita: a black pinafore dress with a voluminous flared skirt, crisp white ruffled hem, white puff-sleeve blouse, high ruffled collar, black ribbon ties, lace trim, small pendant details, and layered frills. Add a white ruffled headband with a black miniature top hat or bow ornament and dangling gothic earrings. She holds a black lace parasol above her head with both hands; the parasol has ornate floral lace edging, subtle embroidered patterns, visible ribs, and a curved handle. Show exactly 4 major outfit/accessory elements clearly: the ruffled dress, the lace parasol, the patterned thigh-high stockings, and chunky black lace-up platform boots. Her fingernails are painted deep red. She sits with one leg folded and the other extended diagonally, wearing black-and-white houndstooth thigh-high stockings and heavy black leather boots with metal eyelets, straps, and thick soles. Use soft cinematic natural lighting, realistic fabric sheen, intricate lace detail, shallow depth of field, elegant Japanese gothic lolita magazine aesthetic, muted black-white-gray palette with warm sun highlights, ultra-realistic skin and hair rendering, vertical 3:4 composition, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
